main.py.role: CLI entry point (Typer). Commands: generate, validate, render, harness, audit.

config.py.role: Configuration constants: paths, model names, PSUR_DB_PATH, INPUT_DIR, OUTPUT_DIR.

llm_client.py.role: Unified LLM client. Anthropic (primary) -> OpenAI (fallback) -> Ollama (local override).

statistics.py.role: Deterministic pre-computation of ALL metrics: rates, UCL, Western Electric rules, cross-tabs.

charts.py.role: Matplotlib chart generation: sales trend, UCL p-chart, region bar, harm donut, MDP bar, RACT heatmap.

imdrf_coder.py.role: IMDRF auto-coding. Deterministic INSORB symptom-code mapping (SKILL F2) + LLM fallback.

data_structures.SYMPTOM_CODE_MAP: dict[str, tuple[str,str]] — 11 INSORB symptom codes to Harm+MDP
data_structures.FORBIDDEN_HARM_TERMS: set — terms that must never appear as Harm categories
data_structures.FORBIDDEN_MDP_TERMS: set — terms that must never appear as MDP categories

psur_auditor.py.role: LLM-powered PSUR Auditor. Audits .docx/.json against MDCG 2022-21 + UK MDR 2024.

requirements.txt.role: Python dependencies: typer, rich, anthropic, openai, openpyxl, python-docx, matplotlib, pandas, Pillow, PyPDF2.

base.py.role: SectionAgent base class. Loads template schema + section guidance, calls LLM per section.

orchestrator.py.role: Runs all 13 section agents (A-M) with audit-remediation loop, checkpoint/resume, postprocessing.

postprocessing.py.role: 30+ deterministic post-processing transforms applied after every section generation.

prefill.py.role: Inject pre-computed immutable values (stats, device identifiers) into section data before LLM call.

stats_filter.py.role: Per-section statistics filtering. Each section receives only the stats it needs.

global_context.py.role: Build the persistent global context assembled ONCE for all 13 sections.

shared_context.py.role: Shared Working Context: prior section findings injected into downstream agents.

section_instructions.py.role: Agent-scoped constraints, fabrication guards, and conditional instructions per section.

sales.py.role: Sales data parser (CSV/Excel) with AI column mapping.

complaints.py.role: CSI complaints parser. Preserves Symptom Code, Fault Code, Nonconformity for SKILL F2.

ract.py.role: Risk Assessment and Control Table parser. Extracts hazards, max expected rates, occurrence codes.

column_mapper.py.role: AI-powered column mapping. Deterministic alias lookup + LLM fallback for unknown schemas.

universal.py.role: Universal multi-format parser: CSV, XLSX, DOCX, PDF, JSON, images, plain text.

cer_extractor.py.role: Comprehensive CER data extractor from DOCX/PDF.

previous_psur.py.role: Structured parser for previous PSUR documents (JSON/DOCX/PDF).

analysis_workbook.py.role: Parser for pre-computed analysis workbooks (multi-sheet Excel with sales, complaints, RACT, etc.).

sqlite_db.py.role: SQLite-backed parsers for complaints and sales with integrity checks.

discovery.py.role: Auto-discover and classify input files by filename keywords + AI fallback.

device_context.py.role: Device metadata extraction: JSON fast-path or LLM fallback from file snippets.

input_parsing.py.role: Master parser orchestration. Delegates to parsers/*, applies SKILL F2 classification.

performance.py.role: Performance and cost reporting (token usage, timing).

harness.py.role: Smarticus PSUR Generation Harness v3. 8-stage pipeline with 11 agents, 16-slot context payload, 25-point validation checklist.

stages.2: data_ingestion_agent — parse all sources, populate 16 context slots, apply F3-F10 reconciliations
stages.3: imdrf_classifier_agent — aggregate Harm->MDP hierarchy for Table 7
stages.4: statistical_engine + risk_assessor (parallel) — rates, UCL, RACT comparison
stages.6: benefit_risk_synthesizer — final synthesis after all data stages

_fabrication_checks.py.role: Detects LLM-generated fake data: rates, UDI-DIs, regions, UK RP.

_formatting_checks.py.role: Document formatting rules: tone, bullets, citations.

_content_checks.py.role: Content integrity: Table 7 sums, cover page, rate calculations.

_consistency_checks.py.role: Cross-section consistency: D vs F serious incidents, A vs M benefit-risk.

_docx_checks.py.role: Rendered DOCX structure validation: sections, tables, formatting.

renderer.py.role: PSURTemplateRenderer facade. Clones FormQAR-054 template, fills placeholders/tables/charts.

_value_map.py.role: ValueMapMixin — builds placeholder-to-value mapping from PSUR JSON + statistics.

_tables.py.role: TableMixin — table fill for Tables 1-9, hierarchical Table 7.

_helpers.py.role: Shared rendering helpers: deep_get, cb (checkbox), stringify.

template_schema.json.role: JSON Schema — authoritative contract between agents and renderer.

section_guidance.json.role: Field-by-field instructions for each section agent.

mdcg_2022_21_knowledge_base.json.role: MDCG 2022-21 + UK MDR 2024 regulatory requirements knowledge base.

ract_occurrence_codes.json.role: Risk classification O1-O5 with rate thresholds.

audit_requirements.json.role: 96 audit requirements for the LLM auditor.

harm_mdp_codes.csv.role: IMDRF Annex A (MDP) and Annex F (Harm) code tables.

FormQAR-054_template.docx.role: DOCX template cloned during rendering. US Letter, Arial, CooperSurgical headers/footers.

device_context.json.role: Structured device metadata: trade names, classification, UDI-DI, NB, intended purpose.

insorb_sales.csv.role: INSORB sales/distribution data by country, month, product.

insorb complaints.csv.role: CSI complaints with 25 columns including Symptom Code, Fault Code, MDR Issued, Investigation Findings.

ract.xlsx.role: Risk Assessment and Control Table (38 hazards).

external_db_search_results_2025.json.role: External database search results: FDA MAUDE, MHRA, TGA DAEN, Health Canada, EUDAMED.

previous_psur_data_template.json.role: Previous PSUR structured data: scope, sales, complaints, CAPAs, benefit-risk conclusion.

INPUT_README.md.role: Full column specifications for all input file types.

device_context_template.json.role: Empty template with all device_context fields.

previous_psur_data_template.json.role: Empty template for previous PSUR data.

pms_plan_data_template.json.role: Empty template for PMS plan data.

sales_data_template.csv.role: Template: date, year, month, quantity, region, country, product.

complaints_data_template.csv.role: Template: date, complaint_number, description, imdrf_code, harm, serious, region.

capa_data_template.csv.role: Template: capa_number, title, status, open_date, close_date, root_cause, type.

ract_template.csv.role: Template for Risk Assessment and Control Table.

output/._note: Generated artifacts (gitignored). Typical contents per run:
output/.PSUR_<device>_<year>.json: Complete PSUR as JSON matching template_schema.json.

charts/.chart_top_mdps.png: Top medical device problems bar chart.

data_flow.3_parsing: pipeline/input_parsing.py delegates to parsers/* (sales, complaints, capa, ract, cer, etc.)
data_flow.4_device_context: pipeline/device_context.py extracts device metadata (JSON fast-path or LLM fallback)
data_flow.5_imdrf_coding: imdrf_coder.py deterministic mapping (SKILL F2) + LLM fallback for uncoded complaints
data_flow.7_section_generation: agents/orchestrator.py runs 13 section agents with filtered stats per section
data_flow.8_postprocessing: agents/postprocessing.py applies 30+ deterministic fixes to LLM output
data_flow.10_rendering: rendering/renderer.py clones FormQAR-054 template, fills placeholders/tables/charts

harness_data_flow.stage_2: data_ingestion -> parse all sources, populate 16 context slots, apply F3-F10 reconciliations
harness_data_flow.stage_4: statistical_engine + risk_assessor (parallel) -> rates, UCL, RACT comparison
